title: NIAB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: The National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Research Scientist I Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their post-graduation and B.E./B. Tech can apply for the NIAB Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age lim...
